goal: submodule_subset[R, K](module_hom_image[R, M, K](h), module_hom_image[R, N, K](f)) = forall(x0: K) { module_hom_image[R, M, K](h).contains(x0) implies module_hom_image[R, N, K](f).contains(x0) }

p.c: function[T0: AddCommGroup, T1: Ring](x0: lib(submodule).Submodule[T1, T0], x1: lib(submodule).Submodule[T1, T0]) { forall(x2: T0) { not x2 ∈ x0 or x2 ∈ x1 } = submodule_subset[T1, T0](x0, x1) }[K, R](module_hom_image[R, M, K](h), module_hom_image[R, N, K](f))

function[T0: AddCommGroup, T1: Ring](x0: lib(submodule).Submodule[T1, T0], x1: lib(submodule).Submodule[T1, T0]) { forall(x2: T0) { not x2 ∈ x0 or x2 ∈ x1 } = submodule_subset[T1, T0](x0, x1) }[K, R](module_hom_image[R, M, K](h), module_hom_image[R, N, K](f))

goal: is_surjective_fn[M, N](g.hom) = forall(x0: N) { exists(k0: M) { g.hom(k0) = x0 } }

p.c: function[T0, T1](x0: T1 -> T0) { forall(x1: T0) { exists(k0: T1) { x0(k0) = x1 } } = is_surjective_fn[T1, T0](x0) }[N, M](g.hom)
function[T0, T1](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T1) { not is_surjective_fn[T0, T1](x0) or exists(k0: T0) { x0(k0) = x1 } }[M, N](g.hom, z)

goal: submodule_subset[R, K](module_hom_image[R, N, K](f), module_hom_image[R, M, K](h)) = forall(x0: K) { module_hom_image[R, N, K](f).contains(x0) implies module_hom_image[R, M, K](h).contains(x0) }

p.c: function[T0: AddCommGroup, T1: Ring](x0: lib(submodule).Submodule[T1, T0], x1: lib(submodule).Submodule[T1, T0]) { forall(x2: T0) { not x2 ∈ x0 or x2 ∈ x1 } = submodule_subset[T1, T0](x0, x1) }[K, R](module_hom_image[R, N, K](f), module_hom_image[R, M, K](h))

function[T0: AddCommGroup, T1: Ring](x0: lib(submodule).Submodule[T1, T0], x1: lib(submodule).Submodule[T1, T0]) { forall(x2: T0) { not x2 ∈ x0 or x2 ∈ x1 } = submodule_subset[T1, T0](x0, x1) }[K, R](module_hom_image[R, N, K](f), module_hom_image[R, M, K](h))

goal: image_h.carrier = image_f.carrier and submodule_subset[R, K](image_h, image_f) and submodule_subset[R, K](image_f, image_h)
module_hom_image[R, M, K](h) = module_hom_image[R, N, K](f)
